shots.title: Map generator + staleness checker (slope map)

hazards.description: API surface parser initially only matched single-line exports, missing multi-line export blocks from core barrel file

shots.notes: Created packages/cli/src/commands/map.ts (632 lines). Scans packages, API surface, CLI commands, guards, MCP tools, tests, sprint history, and gotchas. Outputs CODEBASE.md with YAML frontmatter + auto-generated sections. Staleness checker validates source file drift, git distance, sprint currency, and dead refs. Needed one follow-up fix for multi-line export regex.

shots.title: MCP map module + search integration
shots.notes: Added 'map' to search() module enum. search({ module: 'map' }) returns full CODEBASE.md, search({ module: 'map', query: 'guards' }) returns filtered sections. Includes git SHA staleness warning. Single clean commit.

shots.title: Explore guard upgrade + codebase context rules

hazards.description: Changing explore guard behavior required updating 2 existing tests that asserted the old message format

shots.notes: Enhanced explore guard with staleness awareness (git SHA distance check) and richer context messages with token estimates. Added codebase-context rule generators for Claude Code (.md), Cursor (.mdc), and OpenCode (AGENTS.md section). Updated init command to install new rules. 2 test updates for changed assertions.

shots.title: Review-tier guard (architect review hook)
shots.notes: Added review-tier to GuardName union and GUARD_DEFINITIONS. Fires on ExitPlanMode, reads plan files from .claude/plans/, counts tickets and package refs, recommends review tier (Skip/Light/Standard/Deep). Context-only — never denies. Composes cleanly with workflow-gate.

nutrition.description: Clean build + typecheck + all 1047 tests pass (780 core + 36 store + 166 CLI + 65 MCP) after final commit
7 commits, pushed at 6-commit mark. Commit-per-ticket discipline with test fixes in separate commit.
Only 2 existing test assertions updated (guard count 9→10, explore guard message format). 1 new test added. Zero regressions.

nineteenth_hole.how_did_it_feel: Smooth port from the CaddyStack pattern. The map generator was the bulk of the work (632 lines) but followed a well-understood pattern. MCP integration, guard upgrade, and review-tier guard were all straightforward extensions of existing infrastructure.
nineteenth_hole.advice_for_next_player: The CODEBASE.md is 261 lines / 13.5KB — larger than the 500-line / 5k-token target. Consider trimming verbose sections (API surface types list, full gotcha descriptions) in a future sprint. The MCP 'map' module won't work until the MCP server is restarted (picks up the new code on next session). The review-tier guard reads from .claude/plans/ — it will silently return empty if no plan files exist.
nineteenth_hole.what_surprised_you: The API surface parser was trickier than expected — core's index.ts uses multi-line export blocks extensively, so the initial single-line regex missed most exports. Also, the generated map's readFirstComment() heuristic picks up section dividers (--- Helpers ---) as descriptions for some commands, which could be improved.
nineteenth_hole.excited_about_next: With the codebase map + MCP query + explore guard integration, agents should be able to navigate the SLOPE codebase without spawning Explore subagents for routine navigation. The 80% reduction target for explore tokens is plausible — the map covers packages, API, commands, guards, and gotchas which were the top explore targets.

yardage_book_updates: packages/cli/src/commands/map.ts: New — map generator + staleness checker (632 lines)
packages/cli/src/guards/explore.ts: Enhanced — staleness awareness, map-aware context messages, token estimates
packages/cli/src/guards/review-tier.ts: New — PreToolUse context guard for ExitPlanMode
packages/core/src/guard.ts: GuardName union extended to 10, review-tier GUARD_DEFINITION added
packages/mcp-tools/src/index.ts: search() module enum gains 'map', handleMapQuery() for section filtering
packages/cli/src/commands/init.ts: codebase-context rule installed for Claude Code and Cursor
.claude/rules/codebase-context.md: New — when to use map vs explore
CODEBASE.md: New — auto-generated codebase map (261 lines)
course_management_notes: 4 shots, 2 in_the_hole + 2 green — 2 rough hazards, zero penalties, par
Total test count: 1047 (up from 1046 — 1 new explore guard test)
